## What changed

Describe the behavior, architecture, or decision-system change.

## Why

Explain the operator or customer impact.

## Safety and explainability

- [ ] Consequential actions remain permissioned and idempotent
- [ ] New claims have source references
- [ ] Verification is independent from execution
- [ ] Counterfactuals use deterministic recomputation

## Validation

- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Unit/integration tests
- [ ] Evaluation
- [ ] Production build
- [ ] Browser journey
